description.zh: 分析通达OA漏洞利用工具的Java代码实现，包括GUI界面和漏洞利用流程。
description.en: Analyze Java code implementation of Tongda OA vulnerability exploitation tool, including GUI interface and exploitation process.

content.zh: 分析通达OA漏洞利用代码
程序入口：Main.java调用TDOAFrame创建GUI窗口
content.en: Program entry: Main.java calls TDOAFrame to create GUI window

content.zh: GUI组件：JLabel显示目标地址，JTextField输入URL和Cookie，JButton绑定GetCookieActionListener和GetShellActionListener
content.en: GUI components: JLabel for target address, JTextField for URL and Cookie input, JButton binds GetCookieActionListener and GetShellActionListener

content.zh: 工作流程：Step1获取Cookie -> Step2选择利用方式 -> Step3执行利用
content.en: Workflow: Step1 Get Cookie -> Step2 Select exploitation method -> Step3 Execute exploitation
